# ctyun_rabbitmq_specs (Data Source)
**详细说明请见文档：**



## 样例

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

data "ctyun_rabbitmq_specs" "test"{

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID

### Read-Only

- `specs` (Attributes List) List of RabbitMQ specifications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--specs))

<a id="nestedatt--specs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `specs`

Read-Only:

- `az_list` (List of String) 可用区
- `bandwidth_base` (Number) 基准带宽
- `bandwidth_max` (Number) 最大带宽
- `cpu_num` (Number) CPU
- `flavor_id` (String) 规格id
- `flavor_name` (String) 规格名称
- `flavor_type` (String) 规格类型
- `mem_size` (Number) 内存
- `multi_queue` (Number) 并发队列数量
- `pps` (Number) 每秒包数
- `series` (String) 系列
- `spec_name` (String) 套餐名称
